notes: target_framework is Vue 3 SFC (Composition API); not React
detail.html uses data-include-html for section loading; auto-parser only captures shell; all 10 tab sections were manually reviewed against P0-CONTRACT-DETAIL
case-detail.css contains extensive tab-specific styles; must be decomposed into scoped styles per Vue tab component
6 sample datasets in case-detail-config.js drive the demo; Vue fixtures must replicate all 6 scenarios
documents tab within case-detail shares status enum with documents/ module; P0 contract §6.4 defines mapping
this plan covers only the case-detail page; case-list and case-create have separate gate workspaces
